sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46652" key="h(donok" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡδονο-κ,ρᾰσία,</orth> <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n46652.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rule of pleasure</tr_>, Aristeas <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg008:278" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">278</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
